title: Sergey Brin, Google Co-Founder | All-In Live from Miami
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Sergey Brin!

(0:40) Sergey on his return to Google, and how an OpenAI employee played a role!

(5:58) AI's true superpower and the next jump

(12:23) AI robotics: humanoids and other form factors

(17:07) Future of foundational models and open-source

(19:59) Human-computer interaction in the age of AI

(31:09) Partner shoutouts: Thanks to OKX, Circle, Polymarket, Solana, BVNK, and Google Cloud!

analysis.summary: Sergey Brin, Google Co-Founder, joins the All-In Podcast to discuss his return to Google, AI's true superpower, AI robotics, and the future of foundational models. He shares insights on human-computer interaction in the age of AI and the role of open-source models. The conversation also touches on the next jump in AI and its potential applications.

takeaways.text: AI's true superpower is its ability to learn and improve
Humanoids are a potential form factor for AI robotics
Open-source models are crucial for the future of AI
Human-computer interaction will change significantly with AI
Sergey Brin returned to Google due to an OpenAI employee's role
AI will have a significant impact on various industries
Foundational models will play a key role in AI development
The next jump in AI will be driven by advancements in robotics and human-computer interaction

sentiment.notes: The conversation is upbeat and focuses on the potential benefits of AI, with Sergey Brin sharing his enthusiasm for the technology's future.

notable_moments.description: AI robotics and humanoids are discussed
